Resources

AI Governance Insights

Practical guidance on the EU AI Act, AI security, and what it means for organisations operating in Europe.

Articles

  • Regulation Coming soon

    The EU AI Act is in force — what does that mean for your company?

    An accessible overview of Regulation 2024/1689, who it affects, and what organisations need to do now.

    March 2026 · 6 min read
  • Regulation Coming soon

    High-risk AI systems under the EU AI Act: a plain-language guide

    Explaining Annex III risk categories with real examples from HR, healthcare, credit, and customer-facing AI.

    March 2026 · 8 min read
  • Services Coming soon

    What is an AI readiness assessment and do you need one?

    A clear explanation of what the assessment covers, who it is for, and what you receive at the end.

    March 2026 · 5 min read
  • Security Coming soon

    Why your AI chatbot might be a security risk

    An accessible introduction to prompt injection for a non-technical audience — and how to reduce your exposure.

    Coming soon · 5 min read
  • Checklist Coming soon

    5 things your company should do about AI before the end of this year

    A practical checklist for organisations that want to get ahead of regulatory scrutiny without overcomplicating it.

    Coming soon · 4 min read

Downloadable resources

Free guides and reference documents — available once launched. Register your email below to be notified when each resource is published.

  • EU AI Act Quick Reference Card

    A one-page PDF summarising the risk categories and key obligations under Regulation 2024/1689.

    PDF · 1 page

  • AI Governance Checklist

    A self-assessment checklist your organisation can complete before booking an assessment.

    PDF · 3 pages

  • Sample Assessment Report

    An anonymised extract of a real report showing the quality and depth of findings.

    PDF · 8 pages

Stay ahead of AI regulation.

Monthly updates on EU AI Act developments, AI security risks, and governance best practice. No spam. Unsubscribe anytime.
